title: Taking a Group Photo 拍合照
scene: 春游时，大家一起拍集体照留念。

lines.en: Everyone, let us take a group photo before we leave!
lines.zh: 大家，我们走之前拍张合照吧！
老师，我们应该站在哪里？

lines.en: Stand in three rows. Shorter students in front.
lines.zh: 站成三排。矮的同学在前面。

lines.en: I am short. I will stand in the front row.
Good. Can someone hold this flower for the photo?
lines.zh: 好。谁能在拍照时拿这束花？

lines.en: I can hold it! I will put it right in the middle.
lines.zh: 我来拿！我把它放在正中间。

lines.en: Everyone look at the camera and smile!
Teacher, wait! My hair is messy. Let me fix it.
lines.zh: 老师，等等！我头发乱了。让我弄一下。

lines.en: OK, are you ready now? Say cheese!
lines.zh: 好的，现在准备好了吗？说茄子！

lines.en: Cheese! This will be a beautiful photo!
lines.zh: 茄子！这一定是一张很美的照片！
